experiments.change_description: Simplified and made trigger more aggressive.
G8 Iter 1: Added 'I need a Skill for X', 'workflow automation', 'create an X expert' triggers. Strengthened exclusions for fix/debug/analyze existing.

G8 Iter 2: Added ROUTING RULE (create/build intent always routes here even when domain agents exist), EXCLUSION RULE (existing Skill modification routes elsewhere), explicit Changeling/AOSP domain disambiguation. V pushed from 0.800 to 0.900.

G8 Iter 3 baseline: No description change. Regression from 0.895→0.658 caused by adding 6 new agents (stewards, factory, reviewer) since G8 Iter 2. Positive tests (CREATE prompts) now route to competing agents. All negatives still pass. Structural routing competition issue, not description quality.

Opus 4.7 Shadow Eval: First run on new model. Revealed significant trigger regression (0.63 vs 0.829 baseline). Opus 4.7 literal style appears to over-comply with exclusion rules or fail on previously working imperative triggers. Blocking upgrade until Phase 3 L10 re-baseline.
